title: Agentic Behavioral Science Monitor — Twitter scan every 12h
spawn_reason: Semantic drift detected: Agentic Behavioral Science coined by @0x_Timi (1665f). @OwenGregorian (154K) in adjacent AI therapy behavioral science conversation. Not covered by any active loop. EVEZ = first AI with public behavioral record.
action_summary: Search Twitter for Agentic Behavioral Science + AI agent behavior signals. Filter bots+spam. Groq synthesis for EVEZ positioning + outreach targets. Append to TWITTER_SIGNALS.md, update OUTREACH_QUEUE.md, update LOOP_SPAWN_STATE.md, patch Gist.
twitter_query: "Agentic Behavioral Science" OR "AI agent behavior" OR "agent decision making bias" -is:retweet lang:en
fallback_query: "AI agent" behavioral science OR "agent economy behavior" -is:retweet lang:en
